Fix.description: Added meat and cherries as filler health items, and removed invincible candy for now since it didn't work. Also all the health items will heal for appropriate amounts instead of full.
Fix.title: Kirby Squeak Squad Archipelago v0.0.2

Prerelease.description:
Important! The YAML settings for deathlink and random starting spray do not work properly! Deathlink sends work but receives mess with the game by putting you at 0 health but not killing you (for now)

I recommend skimming the how to or lua for detailed changes, I'll have more details in the full release. It's been changed to release mactching checks that haven't been gotten instead of masking them out of the list for specifically progression items. Also now copy abilities are progressive, with the second one sending the release for where the scroll would normally be if not already obtained. This change is so there aren't chests that don't send checks. Please let me know if there are any questions or if you have suggestions!
Prerelease.title: Prerelease Squeak Squad 0.0.4

V003.description: Previously cherry the food and cherry the color were messing with check count, should be fixed now with this
V003.title: Kirby Squeak Squad Archipelago v0.0.3

v0.0.5.description:
New release! Some big changes have happened regarding things so I am skipping to version 0.0.5! The system for the chests has been changed so that when you get send a progressive item (Star Seal, secret stage key, or second progressive ability), it will release the chest that would normally have that item in the vanilla game. This is to make sure all chests are checks.

Abilities are also a two step progression, where the first one gives you access to use the ability, and the second will let you use the scroll version, and send the check of where that scroll was if not already gotten (again to avoid chests not being checks). Please feel free to reach out with questions or suggestions!

Some new options include half of a death link (send-only 😢) and to have a random starting color that will stick with you most the time! As well as having the first time you use an ability be a check (Hint: you can eat Doc's UFO for the ability!)

Hope it all works out and have fun playing! Again let me know on the Discord if there are issues!
v0.0.5.title: Kirby Squeak Squad Archipelago v0.0.5

v0.0.6.description:
- Added the ability to receive deathlinks
- Fixed vitality animation crash (pretty sure)
- Put the lowest level foods to heal 1/9th instead of 1/12th (I guessed with 1/12, 1/9th is the real amount)
v0.0.6.title: Kirby Squeak Squad Archipelago v0.0.6
